case_title: CHEVRON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS DUNHAM,HEATHER M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $305.15 FILED BY CHEVRON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT DUNHAM,HEATHER M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUNHAM,HEATHER M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEVRON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNHAM,HEATHER M. $205.15 PRINCIPAL, $87.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $292.65, PAYABLE AS FOLLOWS: $100 ON 6/01/94; $100 ON 6/15/94; BALANCE DUE ON JULY 01, A994 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DUNHAM,HEATHER M.
